violations.description: FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Ice machine interior and microwave interiors not properly maintained.

NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Exeriors of cooking equipment interior and exterior of reach-in prep coolers and freezers door handles on reachin cooler/freezers exterior of microwave metal shelves prep tables and other equipment exteriors noted in need of cleaning.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Wood shelves by reachin cooler not properly sealed.

FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floors and walls throughout the establishment and under and around in place equipment noted in need of cleaning. | FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floors under equipment and where cracking noted in need of repair.

SANITIZATION OF EQUIP. AND UTENSILS (4 pts): An inadequate amount of chlorine sanitizer was noted in the final rinse of the dish machine. Sanitizer was way to strong as all 3 lines for the dish machine were in the sanitizer. Corrected on the spot and machine working correctly.
WASH AND RINSE WATER (2 pts): Adequate detergent noted not being used in dish machine. No soap was hooked up to the machine. corrected on site.
FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Ice machine interior and microwave interior next to stove not properly maintained.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Exeriors of cooking equipment interior and exterior of reach-in prep coolers and freezers exterior of microwave and prep tables noted in need of cleaning.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Wood shelves by reachin cooler not properly sealed.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floors and walls throughout the establishment and under and around in place equipment noted in need of cleaning.
VENTILATION HOOD SYSTEM (1 pts): Hood and filters above grill noted not clean.
